title: Divine Farmland
description: Farmland with different upgraded features. All Farmlands are always hydrated! Prevent trampling of crops!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa866cd6bd09b9bb01143d784634fbe57283261_0.webp) # DESCRIPTION Divine Farmland adds new tiered farmlands with incredible features for each farmland. Beware though, some farmlands are hard to create but in exchange for a difficult recipe, an awesome upgrade will contain the farmland.

# FEATURES When in-game press **SHIFT** to reveal each farmland features.
**Uncommon Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. **Rare Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. **Epic Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. - Does not degrade when mined. **Mythical Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. - Does not degrade when mined. - Slightly increases crop's growth speed. **Arcane Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. - Does not degrade when mined. - Moderately increases crop's growth speed. - Emits light. **Legendary Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. - Does not degrade when mined. - Increases crop's growth speed. - Emits light. - Indestructible except for void or despawn. **Divine Farmland** - Moisture is always at max level. - Cannot be trampled. - Does not degrade when mined. - Significantly increases crop's growth speed. - Emits light. - Indestructible except for void or despawn. - Protects crops from explosion and turns lava into stone.

# RECIPES
Spoiler **UNCOMMON FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1d6969de-8b87-4eb5-b99e-a8a42d7e1684.png) - **Dirt** surrounded by **Coal Blocks**
**RARE FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_836f8996-f2f9-4d95-84c5-fad6be77b0b8.png) - **Uncommon Farmland** surrounded by **Iron Blocks**
**EPIC FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_249e7586-3862-4970-8edd-a492df1460f1.png) - **Rare Farmland** surrounded by **Gold Blocks**
**MYTHICAL FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ae820cb6-20c9-49fb-95ee-bc1caa5b59b8.png) - **Epic Farmland** surrounded by **Diamond Blocks**
**ARCANE FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_342f69a6-4ef2-4a16-997f-24b7fbfb2011.png) - **Mythical Farmland** surrounded by **Emerald Blocks**
**LEGENDARY FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a44ed9e2-73a8-489b-9bc0-a047d68cbc33.png) - **Arcane Farmland** surrounded by **Netherite Blocks**
**DIVINE FARMLAND** ![Recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ccbf24f6-428f-4524-99ec-669d70e41ccb.png) - 1x **Dragon's Breath** - 1x **Nether Star** - 1x **Echo Shard** - 1x **Totem of Undying** - 1x **Legendary Farmland** - 1x **Conduit** - 1x **End Crystal** - 1x **Enchanted Golden Apple** - 1x **Beacon**
#
Your support is very much appreciated 😊 [![Donate via Ko-fi](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9fzfevkxtje7qus10kfb2/400-63-kofi_button_red-2.png?rlkey=neocwsdasxcn8syd6xvybldgp&st=6uwwgv4n&raw=1)](https://ko-fi.com/sorasetsuna) #
Can I use this in my modpack? - Yes, you may.
